summary: Re-tested Dulce Café static landing page after SEO/GEO + JSON-LD, menu/gallery sample caps, site-wide parallax + glassmorphism, Share button + OG image, language persistence, and scroll-cue fix. All 11 requested checks PASS. Zero console errors and zero page errors.

test_details.mobile_390_overflow: PASS - sw=390 iw=390 on initial load AND after scrolling through #historia, #menu, #galeria, #opiniones, #contacto. No horizontal overflow at any point.
test_details.menu_cap_toggle: PASS - Default 'All' tab shows exactly 6 menu-item-* cards with data-testid='menu-view-toggle' visible (text 'See the full menu'). Click expands to 11 items; click again collapses to 6. Selecting menu-tab-pasteleria hides toggle and shows 4 pasteleria items. Returning to menu-tab-all resets to 6 + toggle visible.
test_details.gallery_cap: PASS - Exactly 6 gallery-item-* tiles (0..5). All 6 images loaded with naturalWidth > 0 (1024-1200 px). Tight grid-flow-dense packing.
test_details.share_buttons: PASS - data-testid='contact-share' exists, visible, and click does not throw. Web Share API absent in headless → falls back to window.open(wa.me share URL) as expected. data-testid='mobile-share' exists and is visible inside the opened mobile menu.
test_details.seo_metadata: PASS - <title> 'Dulce Café · Panadería y Pastelería Venezolana en Panamá'; meta description present (non-empty); link rel=canonical='https://dulce-cafe.preview.emergentagent.com/'; og:title, og:description, og:image='.../og-image.jpg', og:url all present; twitter:card='summary_large_image'; geo.position='9.0556;-79.5089'; JSON-LD parses with @type 'Bakery', name 'Dulce Café', address, geo {9.0556,-79.5089}, telephone '+507 6745-3546', aggregateRating {4.5, 52}. documentElement.lang='en' (auto-detected from headless en-US, valid 'es'|'en').
test_details.language_persistence: PASS - After clicking lang-toggle, localStorage 'dc_lang'='es'. After full reload, localStorage still 'es' AND document.documentElement.lang='es'. Text reflects ES translations.
test_details.scroll_cue_visibility: PASS - 'Scroll to discover' cue is NOT visible at 390x844 (mobile) nor 768x1024 (tablet); IS visible only at 1440 (desktop). Implemented via hidden lg:flex.
test_details.glass_parallax_layout: PASS - All 6 sections render without breakage at 1440 (hero 1440x900, about 1440x794, menu 1440x1419, gallery 1440x1304, reviews 1440x682, contact 1440x941). Tablet 768 and mobile 390 also no overflow. Glass styling visible on hero stat cards, menu cards, cachitos floating card.
test_details.console_and_page_errors: PASS - 0 console errors, 0 page errors on full load + interaction.
test_details.wa_links: PASS - nav-whatsapp-cta, hero-whatsapp-cta, contact-whatsapp, floating-whatsapp, and all menu-order-* hrefs use https://wa.me/50767453546.

critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: Known accepted warnings remain (THREE.Clock deprecation, Lenis position hint). No functional impact.
Observation: shareSite falls back to window.open(wa.me share URL) when navigator.share is unavailable - good UX in headless/desktop browsers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified pass at iteration 3: menu cap (6 + toggle expanding to 11), gallery cap (exactly 6), SEO/GEO/OG/JSON-LD complete, language persistence via localStorage.dc_lang, scroll cue hidden < lg breakpoint, share buttons (contact-share & mobile-share) work with wa.me fallback, all WA links use wa.me/50767453546, all assets (og-image, favicons, logo) return 200, no horizontal overflow on mobile after scrolling all sections.
